name: RAG Toolkit
description: A modular Python library for building retrieval-augmented generation pipelines. Supports multiple vector stores and LLM providers with a unified interface.

name: Prompt Bench
description: Web app for testing and comparing LLM prompt variants side by side. Tracks cost, latency, and output quality across runs.

name: Portfolio Site
description: This site — built with Astro 6, React islands, and zero runtime JS for static sections. Dark, technical aesthetic.
